user_request: Generate 3 additional test cases based on the patterns you see. Focus on edge cases not currently covered.
bob_contribution: Generated 3 new test cases: test_empty_diff (validates parse_diff handles empty string), test_non_existent_repo (validates load_repo raises FileNotFoundError), and test_empty_files (validates build_user_prompt handles empty file dict). All three were added to the test suite.
